mapper.select: select count(*) from tb_userinfo where email = #{email} and user_type='S'
mapper.insert: insert into tb_userinfo ( loginID, user_type, name, password, chk_tem_password, zipcode, addr1, addr2, birthday, phone, email, reg_date, status ) values ( #{loginID},'S',#{name},#{password},'N', #{zipcode},#{addr1},#{addr2}, #{birthday},#{phone},#{email}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), 'R' )
